name: Chasing Love
original_name: พี่เองก็ลำบาก
overview:
Sadanan, a hot nerd and food researcher, arranged a one-night stand with a mysterious woman under a strict condition: no strings attached. However, the other party broke the terms, asking for an emotional connection. Sadanan ended the steamy encounter and walked away.

But the world really is round. That woman turned out to be Phiangrawin—the daughter of the president of the company where Sadanan worked. And Phiangrawin wasn’t letting go easily. She pursued her with puppy-like devotion, entangling Sadanan’s heart and routine with reckless charm. She even claimed she’d already named their future child.

Adapted from the novel "Chasing Love" (พี่เองก็ลำบา)" by Peony (พีโอนี).

trailers.title: Official Pilot : Chasing Love พี่เองก็ลำบาก | CHANGEVERSE 2026
